props.ChoiceText: At close quarters, the ship stopped being transport and became a battlefield with nowhere to run.
props.ChoiceBio: A boarding action taught you how little water matters once steel crosses the rail.

0.TransitionText: Because a boarding action taught you how little water matters once steel crosses the rail, violence and danger became more profitable than honest passage.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a boarding action taught you how little water matters once steel crosses the rail, tide, weather, and hazard remained the terms of your life.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Sailor, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a boarding action taught you how little water matters once steel crosses the rail, discipline and killing found a sharper use aboard ship and beyond it.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
